name: utopia-ai-arch
description: 👾 Create and maintain the Claude Code `.claude/` layer (agents, skills, slash commands, enforcement hooks, settings.json, refs, claude-architecture.md decision log) for Utopia Flutter projects. Encodes the project-claude-layer blueprint plus the invariants and decision criteria distilled from production implementations across multiple Utopia repos. Use when bootstrapping a new repo's AI architecture, adding a skill/agent/command/hook script, recording a rejected alternative, auditing for drift, or diagnosing why the agent keeps forgetting a project convention.
